extraction.one_line_summary: ASTORGA Jon Aberasturi won stage 5 sprint after Israeli Academy team disrupted Maresco tactics in final 600m, boxing him in at the corner.
extraction.winner: Unable to determine - rider 'Astorga/Aberasturi' not found in roster
tactical_patterns: Israeli Academy deployed four riders in final 600m to box in MARICHKA, disrupting Velia Triestina's leadout train.
LOWNDES Jason sacrificed sprint opportunity to drive tempo for teammate BOUWMAN, revealing Israeli Academy multi-rider sprint depth.
CARTIER repeatedly animated breakaways across multiple stages, signaling domestique willing to burn matches early for teammate positioning.

rider_signals.BOUWMAN Koen: positive: protected by four-man Israeli Academy train in final kilometer, showing team prioritization over other sprinters
rider_signals.MARINI Nicolas: negative: boxed in at final corner despite strong positioning earlier, suggesting vulnerability to numerical disadvantage tactics
rider_signals.CARTIER Alexis: neutral: consistent breakaway presence across stages but unable to convert, indicating strong diesel engine for team duty
rider_signals.LOWNDES Jason: positive: willing to sacrifice personal result driving tempo for 200m+ before finale, showing team-first mentality
